title: dalea cylindrica
intro: Dalea cylindrica, also known as the prairie rose or buffalo clover, is a perennial legume native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to treat kidney stones due to its high concentration of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of dalea cylindrica include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and lowering blood pressure, making it a valuable herb in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures to be used for medicinal purposes.
